docket_entries.description: COURT TRIAL ON JAN-15-2003 TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION ON JAN-15-2003 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. THIS CAUSE CAME ON REGULARLY FOR TRIAL DE NOVO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES.
